data.content:
E客戶
E客户是一个实体组织，主要工作内容包括接受维护服务，并参与授权用量建议、系统优化建议和版本更新建议。作为接受维护服务的主体，E客户的维护记录详细涵盖了与维护相关的各种活动，例如新增Forcepoint Endpoint DLP数据收容、确认Checkpoint LogClm UF log limit等操作，并且接收系统优化和版本更新推荐。此外，其维护记录还包括调整GCP报告用户字段和其他相关任务。

E客户不仅接受系统优化和软件升级的建议，还涉及授权使用的扩展建议。这些维护活动包括但不限于系统优化和软件更新，所有工作都被详细文档化并处理。总的来说，E客户是一个需要定期接收系统优化和版本升级服务的实体组织，其维护记录中包含多项具体任务和技术支持活动。

从多个描述来看，E客户的维护记录不仅包括授权使用扩展建议、系统优化和软件升级推荐等多方面的技术支持活动，还详细记载了各项技术操作的具体内容。这些活动旨在确保系统的最佳运行状态，并通过持续的更新和优化来提升整体性能和服务水平。<SEP>E客戶is a client for whom maintenance work and system improvements are being conducted.

Splunk升版完成
The completion of Splunk version upgrade is an important action item in the maintenance record for E客戶.<SEP>The completion of Splunk version upgrade is a task that has been successfully executed as part of the maintenance work.

2025/12/24 09:00至2025/12/24 17:00
This event represents a specific time period during which maintenance activities for E客戶were conducted.

C人員
C人员是一名工程师，主要职责包括多个客户的系统维护和支持任务。具体来说，C人员承担了E客户、B客户和C客户的系统维护工作，并记录了一些特定日期的工作活动。例如，在2025年10月30日，从下午1:30到下午5:00为E客户提供系统的维护服务；在2025年7月29日与A人员合作处理了E客户的具体系统维护任务；以及在2025年12月31日对B客户的系统进行了维护工作。此外，在2025年12月2日，C人员还对E客户的系统进行了维护。

除了日常的维护任务外，C人员还负责处理和解决与多个客户系统相关的技术问题，并且参与了I客户的Splunk平台的维护工作。他们解决了与Splunk SH异常挂起问题相关的C客户的系统故障，并调整了B客户系统中Splunk平台的用户权限等问题。这些职责体现了C人员在确保多客户系统稳定运行中的关键作用，以及其工作的多样性和灵活性。

总的来说，C人员通过处理日常维护任务及解决具体问题，在保障多个客户系统的可靠性能方面扮演着重要角色。他们的工作不仅涵盖了特定日期如2025年12月2日对E客户的维护工作，还包括了更广泛的B客户系统相关的问题处理工作以及H客户的Splunk平台的维护任务。这种综合方法强调了C人员在确保客户系统平稳运行和维护方面的重要性和灵活性。<SEP>C人員is a handling engineer involved in the maintenance work for A客戶.

B客戶
B客户 is a client company for which detailed maintenance activities and issue resolutions are meticulously documented. These records cover a wide range of operations related to the Splunk systems, including resolving issues with the Splunk Indexer queue being full, performing CentOS system upgrades, evaluating host transfers, conducting NTP service checks, addressing FISAC data collection problems, adding DNS settings, and adjusting IP configurations. The company has also received onsite support for Splunk services and continues to manage ongoing tasks related to software deployments and other operational enhancements.

Maintenance activities for B客户 are continuously recorded and managed by A人员, who provide comprehensive problem resolution and system optimization recommendations. These records highlight specific challenges such as hard disk space saturation issues alongside problems with the Splunk Indexer queue. The documentation indicates that these maintenance efforts aim to ensure ongoing support and system improvements for B客户.

Additionally, B客户's maintenance records encompass various daily operational tasks and issue resolutions, reflecting a comprehensive approach to sustaining and enhancing the company’s systems. Maintenance activities include both routine updates and optimizations as well as targeted solutions to specific issues encountered by the organization.<SEP>B客戶is a client whose maintenance records include issues and tasks related to Splunk indexer queue full, FISAC data collection, and system upgrades.<SEP>B客戶is an organization that requires maintenance activities and problem resolution, including Splunk indexer queue issues and system optimization tasks.<SEP>B客戶is an organization for which maintenance records are documented.<SEP>B客戶is an organization that had maintenance activities involving authorization usage, server performance checks, and system version updates.

A人員,C人員
A人員and C人員are engineers responsible for handling the maintenance work on behalf of B客戶.

A部門
A部門is a department within B客戶where multiple tasks such as Splunk role capability adjustment and PA monthly report resending were performed.<SEP>A部門is an organizational unit within B客戶responsible for certain maintenance tasks, such as user permission adjustments.

2025/12/17 13:30至2025/12/17 18:00
This datetime represents the time period when the maintenance work for B客戶was conducted.

james
James is an individual who submitted API access IP application forms for FISAC data collection purposes at B客戶.

FISAC
FISAC is an organization where API access IP application forms are submitted for specific needs related to maintenance work.<SEP>FISAC is an organization involved in the maintenance of B客户的系统, where IP application forms are submitted.

SH
SH refers to a location or server environment within B客戶's infrastructure, involved in KVstore engine anomaly testing and crowdstrike software deployment.

B部門
B部門is another department within B客戶involved in ongoing tasks like FISAC data collection, KVstore engine anomaly testing, DNS setting addition, and software deployment.

es_admin_user
Es_admin_user is a role or user in the Splunk system that was adjusted to resolve capability anomalies.

admin角色
Admin角色refers to an administrative role within the Splunk system whose capabilities were adjusted alongside es_admin_user.

PA每月報表
PA monthly reports are documents that need regular sending and resending due to scheduling issues.

forwarder
Forwarder is a component involved in DNS setting addition for directing network traffic based on specific IP addresses.

crowdstrike套件
Crowdstrike package refers to software deployed onto SH (a location or server environment) as part of maintenance tasks.

SH的KVstore狀態測試環境
The testing environment for SH's KVstore status is used to diagnose and resolve issues related to the KVstore engine in a controlled setting.

Tenable API App串接
Tenable API App integration is an ongoing task aimed at connecting Tenable’s platform with existing systems for better security management.<SEP>Tenable API App串接is a task related to integrating Tenable API application.<SEP>Task involving integration of the Tenable API application with B客戶's systems.<SEP>這是一項將進行中的任務，旨在連接和整合Tenable的API應用程序，以提升安全性和監控功能。<SEP>Planning the integration of Tenable API App, pending further implementation.

Splunk Indexer Queue Full Problem
The Splunk Indexer Queue Full problem requires further investigation and temporary measures to address the issue.

版本更新建議
E客戶is advised to upgrade to the latest version of Splunk to resolve identified vulnerabilities.

Splunk Indexer queue full
B客戶faces the issue of Splunk Indexer queue full and has taken temporary measures to address it.<SEP>A problem encountered during the Splunk onsite maintenance, where the indexer queue is full and measures are being taken to resolve it.<SEP>Splunk Indexer queue full is an issue related to system performance and requires further investigation and resolution.

150GB
E客戶is recommended to expand authorization to at least 150GB for sufficient space.

9.3.8 version
E客戶is using a 9.3.8 version that has been flagged for vulnerabilities; an upgrade to the latest version is recommended.

DEP02主機
#DEP02主机是B客户的一台连动主机，涉及远程配置文件备份脚本的问题。

A人員
A人员是一位负责维护工作的工程师，主要职责包括处理多个客户的多种维护活动。这些客户包括B客户、F客户、G客户、A客户和I客户。具体来说，A人员在不同的日期进行了以下维护工作：

- 对于B客户的系统，A人员于2025年12月4日从上午9:30到10:00进行了一次维护。
- 与F客户的维护工作两次：一次是2025年11月24日上午10:30至下午12:00，另一次于2025年12月5日从下午1:30到下午3:30。
- 对G客户负责进行特定任务的维护工作，具体是在2025年12月1日上午10:00至中午12:00之间完成了一项重要任务。
- 此外，A人员还管理了I客户的设备维护，并特别解决了与防火墙事件导入时间异常相关的问题。

这些描述共同表明A人员作为工程师在系统和设备的维护工作中扮演着积极而重要的角色。除了上述提及的具体工作日期，例如2025年12月4日对B客户进行的工作外，还有其他未详细列出的时间段和任务。此外，在与F客户的系统相关联的工作中，特别强调了从2025年11月24日上午10:30到下午12:00的维护工作。

A人员在多个组织的不同时间段内展现出广泛的职责范围，这不仅包括了对B客户和F客户的持续维护责任。具体而言，除了日常的系统与设备维护外，还涉及到了用户权限调整、健康检查以及现场支持等更为专业的任务处理。

进一步地，A人员于2025年12月24日执行了一次针对Splunk每周onsite的工作，并且确认了Maintainer账号权限和对DEP02服务进行的健康检查。这些活动表明A人员不仅具备广泛的专业技能，还能够在多个维护项目中提供具体的建议和支持。

综上所述，A人员是一位活跃且多才多艺的工程师，其工作涵盖了为多家客户进行系统与设备的维护任务，并展示了在不同组织和时间框架内执行多种专业职责的能力。<SEP>A人員is the handling engineer for the maintenance record of B客戶.<SEP>A人員is one of the engineers responsible for handling maintenance tasks for A客戶.<SEP>A人員is a handling engineer involved in the maintenance work for A客戶.

CDIBHMGT02
CDIBHMGT02是B客户的一台主机，其IP地址已更改以解决备份脚本异常问题。

KGIBIDX04
KGIBIDX04 is a host that has been decommissioned, and its backup schedule was removed during the maintenance.

SH KVstore引擎異常測試
SH的KVStore引擎异常测试是在个人测试环境中进行的一项活动。<SEP>SH KVstore引擎異常測試is an event where testing of the SH KVstore status is being conducted in a personal test environment.<SEP>A test being conducted on the SH KVstore engine to check its status in a personal testing environment.

Centos作業系統升級
CentOS操作系统升级是一项正在评估中的维护任务。<SEP>CentOS操作系统升级是指对CentOS系统的更新活动，目前处于评估阶段。<SEP>Centos作業系統升級refers to an ongoing assessment for upgrading CentOS operating system.<SEP>Centos作業系統升級is an ongoing evaluation and planning task aimed at upgrading CentOS systems for B客戶.<SEP>An upgrade task for the CentOS operating system, currently under evaluation.

B部門,C人員
C人员在个人测试环境中进行SH的KVStore引擎异常测试。

KGIBIDX04,CDIBHMGT02
在维护过程中调整了KGIBIDX04和CDIBHMGT02的配置，以确保备份脚本正常运行。

FISAC資料收容
B部门正在与FISAC合作收集数据并申请需要使用的IP地址。<SEP>FISAC資料收容refers to data collection activities involving FISAC.<SEP>FISAC資料收容is the process of collecting FISAC data which has been submitted for API access requests.<SEP>Task involving data collection for FISAC by B部門personnel.

Splunk 2025 MA 11月定保.DM20250088_(7/12)
This is the maintenance report document for E客戶's Splunk system in November 2025, detailing specific actions and recommendations.

2025/12/04 08:30至2025/12/04 09:00
This event represents a specific maintenance period from 08:30 to 09:00 on December 4, 2025.

150 GB
Recommended authorization expansion to provide sufficient space as part of E客戶's maintenance.<SEP>The recommended expansion for authorization is 150 GB to provide sufficient space.

10.0.2 / 2025.11.14
Latest recommended version for E客戶to address known weaknesses.<SEP>The recommended updated version to address security vulnerabilities is 10.0.2 as of November 14, 2025.

9.3.8 / 2025.11.14
E客戶's current version of Splunk which has been identified with vulnerabilities.<SEP>The current version of the software being used is 9.3.8 as of November 14, 2025.

661.01 GB
Current average usage amount for E客戶, requiring additional authorization.

Splunk Indexer Queue Full Issue
B客戶is facing a Splunk indexer queue full technical problem.<SEP>The Splunk indexer queue full issue is a problem encountered by B客戶that requires further investigation and resolution.

150GB Authorization Expansion Recommendation
E客戶has been recommended to expand their authorization by at least 150 GB.

Splunk 202510-12季維護
Splunk 202510-12季維護is the seasonal maintenance event conducted for D客戶by B人員in December 2025.

B人員
B人员是一名工程师，主要负责处理C客户和D客户的维护工作。在具体的维护记录中，B人员于2025年11月25日以及同年11月26日下午1点30分至下午2点30分为C客户提供服务，解决了包括Splunk SH异常挂起在内的技术问题。此外，在2025年12月19日为D客户提供了维护支持。

在后续的工作中，B人员继续为C客户提供技术支持和服务。具体到2026年1月5日，B人员处理了多项任务，其中包括解决磁盘用量异常的问题。另外，还有一份记录显示，在2026年1月2日的下午17点33分至17点35分之间，B人员为C客户提供了一次维护服务。

综上所述，B人员在2025年下半年和2026年初活跃于多个时间点，主要负责处理涉及常规设备保养、故障排除以及特定技术（如Splunk）的专业技术支持工作。这些记录表明了B人员在其职责范围内的广泛责任和技术专长。<SEP>B人員is the handling engineer responsible for performing maintenance tasks on C客户的系统.<SEP>B人員is the handling engineer for the C客戶maintenance record.<SEP>B人员是处理这项维护工作的工程师。<SEP>B人員is the engineer responsible for handling the maintenance work for C客戶.<SEP>B人員is the handling engineer responsible for the maintenance work on C客戶.

D客戶
D客戶is an organization that had maintenance performed by B人員on 2025/12/19.<SEP>D客戶is a customer whose maintenance record involves the handling of pice_logs and Splunk configuration issues.

平均授權用量
The average authorization usage was 117.92 GB during the Splunk maintenance for D客戶.

伺服器效能
Server performance is reported as normal during the maintenance of D客戶's system.<SEP>Server performance was deemed normal during the maintenance review.

最新Splunk版本
The latest available Splunk version as of maintenance time is 10.0.2/ 2025.11.14.

授權量
The authorization quantity is 131 GB as reported during the Splunk maintenance of D客戶.

當前Splunk版本
The current Splunk version is 9.3.8 / 2025.11.14, according to the maintenance report for D客戶.

F客戶
F客戶is a customer whose maintenance record indicates recommendations for software updates and capacity expansion.<SEP>F客戶is a client for whom maintenance activities were recorded, including authorization usage recommendations and system optimization.<SEP>F客戶is a customer for whom maintenance activities are being conducted, including authorization usage and version update recommendations.<SEP>F客戶is an organization for which maintenance records are documented.<SEP>F客戶is a client that had maintenance records detailing authorization usage, server performance, system optimization recommendations, and version updates.

10.0.2/2025.11.14
The latest recommended version for update is 10.0.2 released on November 14, 2025.<SEP>最新的Splunk版本是10.0.2，日期標記為2025年11月14日。<SEP>Version 10.0.2 released on 2025-11-14 is the latest version available to B客戶but has not been upgraded yet due to lack of critical vulnerabilities.<SEP>The latest version available is 10.0.2/2025.11.14, recommended for immediate upgrade due to recent vulnerability findings.<SEP>The latest version available for F客戶's systems is recommended as 10.0.2 released on 2025.11.14.

splunk_銀行處11月月維護
This event denotes the monthly maintenance process conducted at splunk銀行處in November.

9.3.3/2025.02.26
The current version of the software being used by F客戶is 9.3.3 as of February 26, 2025.<SEP>Version 9.3.3 released on 2025-02-26 is the current version of a system used by B客戶.<SEP>當前使用的Splunk版本是9.3.3，日期標記為2025年2月26日。<SEP>The current version in use is 9.3.3/2025.02.26, which has been flagged with vulnerabilities and needs to be updated.<SEP>The current version used by F客戶's systems is noted as 9.3.3 released on 2025.02.26, which has been flagged for potential vulnerabilities.

2025/11/24 11:30至2025/11/24 12:00
The specified time period indicates when the maintenance activities were carried out for F客戶.

I客戶
I客戶is a client for whom maintenance activities were conducted, including authorization usage adjustments and system upgrades.<SEP>I客戶is a client for whom maintenance records are being kept and reviewed.<SEP>I客戶is an organization for which maintenance records are documented.<SEP>I客戶is a client whose maintenance record involves firewall event import time anomalies.

Red Hat
Red Hat is an operating system version 9.4 used by I客戶with EOS date of 2027/5/31.

Splunk_12月維護
Splunk_12月維護refers to the maintenance activities conducted for Splunk in December, involving authorization adjustments and system checks.

GeoDB
GeoDB是地理数据库，本周进行了更新操作。<SEP>GeoDB是本周需要更新的数据或数据库系统之一。<SEP>GeoDB is a database that was updated as part of the maintenance activities.<SEP>GeoDB is a geographical database that was updated during the maintenance record.<SEP>GeoDB更新是本周的主要工作项目之一。

data.entity_name: DNS_TUNNELING_單一來源查詢不同網域數量與DNS查詢次數超標告警
data.content:
DNS_TUNNELING_單一來源查詢不同網域數量與DNS查詢次數超標告警
关于DNS隧道的单一来源查询不同域名数量和DNS查询次数超标警告进行了调整。

Gitlab
GitLab是一个版本控制系统软件，在本次维护中从18.1.6升级到18.5.2以修复漏洞CVE-2025-11224。

C客戶
C客户是一家组织，其维护记录详细记载了与Splunk服务相关的多项技术支持活动和服务更新。这些记录涵盖了针对C客户的维护处理过程，包括特定任务和涉及Splunk驻点服务的各类事件。维护活动中包含对Splunk服务的调整、配置变更（如警报设置变化）、GitLab版本升级以及解决异常挂起等问题的情况。

详细的维护记录还提到工程师B在2026年1月5日执行的任务，包括授权使用检查和服务器性能监控等工作内容。这些记录全面且详尽地描述了为C客户提供的技术支持活动，涵盖了与Splunk驻点服务相关的常规更新和事件响应措施。

此外，C客户的维护历史反映了其持续与多家服务商合作的现状，这表明通过定期更新和主动解决技术问题，该组织不断努力确保系统的稳定性和功能健全。维护记录还显示了包括地理数据库（geodb）更新、完成月度维护任务以及进行超过一年的智能对比等工作内容。

这些文档不仅详细记载了C客户的维护历史，而且还体现了其与各服务提供商之间持续不断的互动和合作，以确保系统长期运行无虞并提供最佳的服务质量。<SEP>C客戶is a customer whose maintenance record includes Splunk on-site service activities.<SEP>C客戶is an organization for which maintenance records are documented.<SEP>C客戶is an organization for which maintenance records are being documented.

Splunk駐點服務202511第四周
Splunk驻点服务第四周是指在2025年11月进行的Splunk维护工作。

data.entity_name: AI網站服務紀錄調閱儀表板
data.content:
AI網站服務紀錄調閱儀表板
为了方便后续定期查阅AI网站连接记录，已建立调阅仪表盘。

VMware Tools
VMware Tools is software that requires a security update to fix vulnerabilities.

CVE-2025-41244, CVE-2025-41246
These are specific vulnerabilities in VMware Tools that need patching.

KPMG滲透測試IP白名單
The KPMG penetration test IP whitelist is a process to add IPs and modify rules for proper matching.<SEP>将IP和网段加入到KPMG渗透测试的白名单中，并修改了告警语法以同时对比IP和网段。

CVE-2025-41244
The CVE-2025-41244 vulnerability requires an update to VMware Tools version 12.3.5.

150GB授权量
E客户的授权用量被建议扩大到至少150GB以提供足够的空间。

索引队列问题
B客户面临Splunk Indexer queue full的问题，并采取了临时措施解决。

CVE-2025-41246
The CVE-2025-41246 vulnerability requires an update to VMware Tools version 12.3.5.

系统优化建议
E客户的10台UF设备超出预设传输速度上限，安装更新套件解决问题。

KVstore憑證
KV store凭证指的是与Splunk的KV存储相关的证书，需要定期检查和更新以保证系统的正常运行。

NTP服務
NTP服务是指网络时间协议，用于确保计算机系统的时间同步。

Splunk
Splunk refers to software used for searching, monitoring, and analyzing machine-generated big data.<SEP>Splunk is a software used for monitoring and analyzing log data.<SEP>Splunk is a software tool used by E客戶, requiring version updates and system optimization due to identified weaknesses.

FIsac情資撈取
FISAC情报搜集是指获取特定信息或数据的过程，涉及防火墙开通等步骤。<SEP>FIscal情报抽取任务已完成，等待防火墙开通。

Hank
Hank is the recipient of Splunk maintenance reports.<SEP>Hank is a person who received the account inventory report.

IDX cluster
IDX集群是Splunk系统的一部分，用于处理和存储索引数据。

UF
UF represents a device or unit that experienced connectivity issues with indexers, exceeding 15 minutes of disconnection time.<SEP>#101 UF devices have exceeded the predefined threshold of no connection with indexer for over 15 minutes, leading to optimization suggestions and updates.

Splunk_信用卡處11月月維護
